description: Portable battery sharing station for Battery Doctor app. Needs: 18650 lithium-ion battery compartment (4-cell), sharing mechanism (lock/unlock), USB-C charging ports, LED indicators, plastic housing (ABS or similar), QR code mount, smartphone bracket. Target cost: < $25 per unit. Looking for suppliers in Dongguan with experience in consumer electronics assembly and battery product manufacturing.
special_requirements: Must have battery safety certification (UN38.3, IEC 62133). Experience with shared economy products preferred.
